title: Coordinate Geometry
description: Straight lines and circles in the coordinate plane: gradients, equations of lines, parallel and perpendicular lines, midpoints and distances, the equation of a circle, and how lines and circles intersect.
objectives: Calculate the gradient of a line joining two points and use it to test whether lines are parallel or perpendicular
Find the equation of a straight line in the forms y = mx + c and ax + by + c = 0
Find the midpoint of a line segment and the distance between two points
Recognise and write the equation of a circle (x-a)^2 + (y-b)^2 = r^2 and find its centre and radius by completing the square
Use the perpendicular-bisector property of a chord to find a circle's centre, and use the tangent-radius perpendicularity property
Find the points of intersection of a line and a circle by solving simultaneous equations that reduce to a quadratic

lessons.title: Straight lines: gradient, equations, parallel and perpendicular
Lines and circles: tangents, chords and intersections
